dimensions.name: test-runtime-contract-drift
dimensions.description: Find tests, docs/test-seed entries, snapshots, and generated fixtures that encode retired or mismatched runtime contracts. Evidence must tie a test artifact to current implementation or docs with concrete file:line references.

dimensions.name: workflow-completeness-gaps
dimensions.description: Find public flows whose tests cover only fragments instead of complete user-visible workflows: install/init/doctor/archive/review/store/sync/onboard/cite flows, including missing cross-package or integration coverage.

dimensions.name: negative-edge-error-coverage
dimensions.description: Find missing or weak coverage for error paths, invalid inputs, filesystem failures, malformed JSON/JSONL, collisions, stale state, concurrency, and graceful degradation behavior.

dimensions.name: fixture-snapshot-stale-protection
dimensions.description: Find snapshot, fixture, seed, and golden-test practices that can pass while protecting stale behavior, old names, retired commands, or implementation noise instead of stable contracts.

dimensions.name: tdd-red-authenticity-and-test-quality
dimensions.description: Find tests that are not meaningful red-first guards: skipped/only tests, tautological assertions, excessive mocking of the unit under test, brittle implementation assertions, missing fail-before-fix evidence, or broad coverage claims without assertions.
